title: ScaleOutput
description: Multipliers for rescaling a recipe to a new batch size and efficiency. The caller applies these factors to ingredient amounts; the calc engine itself does no recipe mutation.

volume_factor.description: Multiplier for any quantity that scales linearly with batch volume — hops, yeast, miscs, water-derived volumes.

fermentable_factor.description: Multiplier for fermentable additions: volume_factor × (from_efficiency / to_efficiency). Lower target efficiency means more grain to hit the same OG.

to_batch_size_l.description: Echoed target batch size, in liters.
